title: Envoy
content:
Oh, to be able to capture and bring
            And bind in the bonds of control,
        Some of the carols that warble and sing
            Down in the depths of my soul.
meaning:
"Envoy" is a quintessential example of Freeman Edwin Miller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
